description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed constructed from horizontal wooden slats, reinforced by vertical posts and metal brackets. The cart features two large spoked wooden wheels at the rear and two smaller wheels at the front, providing stability and ease of movement. The front of the cart is equipped with two long, straight wooden handles for manual pulling or pushing. Side rails made of wooden planks run along the length of the cargo area, preventing items from falling out during transport. The wood appears weathered and dark-stained, giving the cart a vintage, utilitarian appearance. Metal fasteners and wheel rims add structural integrity and durability to the overall design.
description: A vintage wooden handcart with side rails, large spoked wheels, and long front handles, designed for manual transport of goods. The cart features an open slatted cargo bed and weathered wood construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, large rear wheels, side rails, and extended front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open cargo bed, the two long handles, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the side rails and wheel structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open slatted cargo bed and the rear wheels, with side rails visible on both sides.
